title: Tekst
description: Doing silly stuff to optimize Minecraft's text rendering
body:
# Tekst

A silly little mod to make text rendering faster!

This is a mod designed to improve text rendering speeds in scenarios where there are lots of formatted characters (e.g. shadows, underlines, strikethroughs). This can have quite an impact when playing on servers such as Hypixel, where chat and nametags have tons of formatting.

This mod has no known incompatabilities and has no dependencies.

Report bugs in the linked discord server.

# Benchmarks (Middle-end hardware, using Fabulously Optimized):

![Performance Difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e820a80867a1bee28d165bd82d3a848324a77745.png)

(F3 screen in void is used here to have a large, but consistent amount of formatted text similar to popular servers)
